title: Design and supervise complex environmental field surveys
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Design and supervise complex environmental field surveys demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria.

elements.title: Confirm survey requirements with senior staff

pcs.text: Confirm the purpose and objectives of the field survey activities with senior management and details of information required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm the purpose and objectives of the field survey activities with senior management and details of information required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm the purpose and objectives of the field survey activities with senior management and details of information required.

pcs.text: Clarify the purpose and objectives of the field survey activities with all stakeholders within the context of the workplace's overall environmental program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clarify the purpose and objectives of the field survey activities with all stakeholders within the context of the workplace's overall environmental program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clarify the purpose and objectives of the field survey activities with all stakeholders within the context of the workplace's overall environmental program.

pcs.text: Identify and accurately interpret all external statutory requirements and workplace protocols that relate to the defined field survey activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and accurately interpret all external statutory requirements and workplace protocols that relate to the defined field survey activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and accurately interpret all external statutory requirements and workplace protocols that relate to the defined field survey activities.

pcs.text: Analyse drivers and constraints that may influence field survey activities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Analyse drivers and constraints that may influence field survey activities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Analyse drivers and constraints that may influence field survey activities.

pcs.text: Document the type, quantity and quality of data needed to meet the defined objectives
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document the type, quantity and quality of data needed to meet the defined objectives?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document the type, quantity and quality of data needed to meet the defined objectives.

pcs.text: Refine and document the detailed objectives of the field activities with senior management and stakeholders
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Refine and document the detailed objectives of the field activities with senior management and stakeholders?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Refine and document the detailed objectives of the field activities with senior management and stakeholders.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Confirm survey requirements with senior staff

elements.title: Design field survey activities

pcs.text: Develop and document details of the field survey methodology

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop and document details of the field survey methodology.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Discuss and confirm survey methodology with senior staff and external experts or stakeholders.

pcs.text: Develop work program, including timetable and staff roles and responsibilities for the total field survey, and all related activities

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop work program, including timetable and staff roles and responsibilities for the total field survey, and all related activities.

pcs.text: Ensure that work program conforms to workplace requirements covering risk management, data quality procedures, safety, environmental and emergency requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure that work program conforms to workplace requirements covering risk management, data quality procedures, safety, environmental and emergency requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure that work program conforms to workplace requirements covering risk management, data quality procedures, safety, environmental and emergency requirements.

pcs.text: Document work program
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document work program?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document work program.

pcs.text: Address all administration requirements and obtain appropriate approvals
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Address all administration requirements and obtain appropriate approvals?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Address all administration requirements and obtain appropriate approvals.

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform survey work safely and with minimal impact on the environment.

pcs.text: Arrange for the checking, packaging and transportation of all samples, equipment and instruments back to base

what_to_look_for: Accurate technical knowledge of follow data quality procedures
minimum_expected_knowledge: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow data quality procedures.
indicators_of_partial_understanding: Knows the general concept but cannot specify technical detail
indicators_of_strong_understanding: Demonstrates precise, contextual, technically accurate knowledge with workplace application
